name: threedi-mi-utils

metadata.name: threedi-mi-utils
metadata.summary: Python package with utilities for the 3Di Modeller Interface

documentation:
# threedi-mi-utils
Python package with utilities for the 3Di Modeller Interface

# Local development

  $ docker-compose build

  $ docker-compose run --rm qgis-desktop pytest

functions.name: threedi_mi_utils.tests.conftest.qgis_app_initialized
documentation: Make sure qgis is initialized for testing.

classes.name: threedi_mi_utils.news.news_injector.QgsNewsSettingsInjector

methods.name: threedi_mi_utils.news.news_injector.QgsNewsSettingsInjector.load
documentation: Loads all news items from a provided JSON file

methods.name: threedi_mi_utils.news.news_injector.QgsNewsSettingsInjector.items
documentation: Returns the list of custom news items in the settings, useful for testing

methods.name: threedi_mi_utils.news.news_injector.QgsNewsSettingsInjector.clear
documentation: Removes all custom news items from settings, useful for testing

methods.name: threedi_mi_utils.news.news_injector.QgsNewsSettingsInjector.add_item
documentation: Add items to settings, but only if they are not expired and do not already exist

A hack to be able to add custom news items to Qgis news feed window.
https://gis.stackexchange.com/questions/342147/adding-own-items-into-qgis-3-10-news-feed/342218#342218

We'll add additional news item (with a very high key) in the settings...

documentation: Check and modify path to bypass Windows MAX_PATH limitation.

functions.name: threedi_mi_utils.working_dir.working_dir.list_dirs
documentation: Returns a (non-recursive) list of directories in a specific path.

methods.name: threedi_mi_utils.working_dir.working_dir.LocalSchematisation.initialize_from_location
documentation:
Initialize local schematisation structure from the root schematisation dir.
In case use_config_for_revisions is True, the revisions are derived from the json file,
otherwise the schematisation dir is scanned for "revision" folders.

documentation: Read schematisation metadata from the JSON file.

documentation: Write schematisation metadata to the JSON file.
